title: Nostalgic Chewy American Emmentaler Cheese Braise
description: A floral and chewy American dish featuring emmentaler cheese braised gently to perfection, perfect for a nostalgic evening meal.

ingredients.name: 2 oz (60g) emmentaler cheese
ingredients.notes: Choose a soft to medium aged Emmental for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Stir in the flour and cook for an additional minute to remove raw flour taste.
Gradually add the red wine vinegar while continuously stirring to form a smooth sauce.
Pour in the can of diced tomatoes with their juice. Bring the mixture to simmer.
Fold in the shredded Emmental cheese, stirring until it melts completely. Adjust seasoning if needed with salt and pepper.
Transfer the braising liquid to an oven-safe casserole dish or Dutch oven and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C), allowing the cheese to soften further and deepen in flavor.
